name: transworld-engagement
releaseNote: Phase 0 of the research-portal merge — TypeScript toolchain enabled inertly (allowJs on, checkJs off; all existing JS untouched and unchecked), scoped editorial font classes, and the research schema (reports + 5 child tables, send_log, send_jobs, report_subscriptions keyed to contacts, the two private report-pdfs buckets, and claim_due_send_jobs). Zero user-facing change; no runtime dependencies added.
